import { createContext, useContext } from 'solid-js' export const ShadowDomTargetContext = createContext<ShadowRoot | undefined>( undefined, ) export const DevtoolsOnCloseContext = createContext< | { onCloseClick: ( e: MouseEvent & { currentTarget: HTMLButtonElement; target: Element }, ) => void } | undefined >(undefined) export const useDevtoolsOnClose = () => { const context = useContext(DevtoolsOnCloseContext) if (!context) { throw new Error( 'useDevtoolsOnClose must be used within a TanStackRouterDevtools component', ) } return context }
